system.description:
Roll +Body when you take a hit.

10+: It seemed more dangerous than it was; you shrug off the hit without any problems.

7-9: It takes you off guard. Choose two: take an appropriate condition; you're knocked out of position, putting you in more danger; you lose something important.

6-: You're hurt badly. Choose one: pass out or flee; you're cursed, severely injured or deeply affected (the GM tells you how); or take all three options from the 7-9 list.

results.success: It seemed more dangerous than it was; you shrug off the hit without any problems.
results.partial: It takes you off guard. Choose two: take an appropriate condition; you're knocked out of position, putting you in more danger; you lose something important.
results.failure: You're hurt badly. Choose one: pass out or flee; you're cursed, severely injured or deeply affected (the GM tells you how); or take all three options from the 7-9 list.
